pre_flight.description: No uncommitted changes from previous work

steps: Identify what the task requires the system to do
Write the test that proves it works
Run the test and confirm it FAILS
If test passes without implementation — the test is wrong, fix it
Write minimum code to make the test pass
Do not add functionality beyond what the test requires
Run the test and confirm it PASSES
Run full test suite and confirm no regressions

task_execution_cycle.description: Optional — clean up without changing behaviour
steps: Run tests again — must still pass
Commit with message referencing task number

scope_lock_triggers: Task requires modifying a file outside the feature's declared scope
Task requires a schema migration not in plan.md
Task reveals a spec ambiguity that could go multiple ways
Task would require changing a CONTRACT: marker

constitution_checks.principle_ii: Failing test must exist before implementation
constitution_checks.principle_vi: All queries scoped by userId, invariants enforced server-side
constitution_checks.principle_vii: Server created in beforeAll, no app.close() in afterEach
constitution_checks.principle_ix: No drift from established folder structure and naming conventions

end_of_feature_gates: cd api && npm test — all pass
cd app && npm test — all pass
CONTRACT markers present on ownership-enforcing code
No scope expansion without explicit approval
